query:
INSERT INTO builds (
                  finished,
                  timestamp,
                  jobset_id,
                  job,
                  nixname,
                  drvpath,
                  system,
                  maxsilent,
                  timeout,
                  ischannel,
                  iscurrent,
                  priority,
                  globalpriority,
                  keep
                ) VALUES (
                  0,
                  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INT4,
                  $1,
                  $2,
                  $2,
                  $3,
                  $4,
                  7200,
                  36000,
                  0,
                  0,
                  100,
                  0,
                 0)
                RETURNING id;
